name: anyshift
description: Public Claude Code plugins maintained by Anyshift: skills for the Annie CLI and the Anyshift MCP server, plus future SRE methodology skills.

plugins.name: annie-skills
plugins.description: Teaches an agent how to call the Anyshift MCP server: the 5 read-only tools (catalog_resource_types, search_resources_by_term, track_infrastructure_changes, audit_resource_timeline, inspect_resource_details), worked examples, and failure modes. Also documents the Annie CLI chat client for human users.

plugins.name: sre-skills
plugins.description: Vendor-neutral SRE methodology skills for AI agents: investigate a live incident, analyze change impact, hand over oncall, author a postmortem, audit reliability. Runs offline against fixtures, no credentials required.
